storyHook: 上课听讲，做练习，放学回家

narrative.method: 听讲解、做练习、提问回答、收拾书包放学
narrative.event: 甲没听懂作业要求，想在放学前问清楚

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning. Please take your seats.
turns.zh: 大家早上好，请坐好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good morning, sir. I am a bit late. My error.
turns.zh: 老师早。我迟了一点点。是我的错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is all right. Take your seat and get ready.
turns.zh: 没事，坐下准备上课吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I have my book and pen here.
turns.zh: 好的，我带了书和笔。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Today we get some new words.
turns.zh: 今天我们来学几个新词。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: New words? I hope they are not too hard.
turns.zh: 新词？希望别太难。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are simple. I will put them on the board.
turns.zh: 不难，我写到黑板上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We say them after you, right?
turns.zh: 我们跟着您念一遍，行吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that is a good idea. Let me say it, then you say it back.
turns.zh: 好主意，我先说，然后你跟着说。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am ready. Let's start.
turns.zh: 我准备好了，开始吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now I will give you a paper with some work to do.
turns.zh: 现在发一张练习纸给你们做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A paper? What do we do with it?
turns.zh: 练习纸？要我们做什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Make new words say things. It is not hard.
turns.zh: 用新词表达意思，不难的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. I will give it a go.
turns.zh: 明白了，我试试看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Take your time and do your best.
turns.zh: 好，慢慢做，尽力就行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am looking at the last one. It is not clear to me.
turns.zh: 我在看最后一道题，不太明白。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Which bit is hard? Say it for me.
turns.zh: 哪部分卡住了？念给我听听。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It says 'make a story with these words.' But how long?
turns.zh: 它说‘用这些词编个故事’，但要多长呢？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ah, good question. Three or four lines is enough.
turns.zh: 啊，问得好。三四行就够了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And do we have to use all the words on the list?
turns.zh: 那得用上列表里所有的词吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, take three or four. The rest are for you to take what you like.
turns.zh: 不用，拿三四个就行，剩下的你随便拿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, that makes sense now. Thank you, Miss.
turns.zh: 好了，这下清楚了。谢谢老师。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are welcome. Now get on with it, time is short.
turns.zh: 不客气。赶紧写吧，时间不多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it down now. I have a thought for a short story.
turns.zh: 我现在就写，有个小故事的思路了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will come round to see your work in a minute.
turns.zh: 好，我一会儿过来看看你写的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have a story about a cat and a bird.
turns.zh: 我有个关于猫和鸟的故事。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. Let me see what you have.
turns.zh: 听起来不错。让我看看你写的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here it is. The cat saw a bird in the tree.
turns.zh: 写好了。猫看见树上有只鸟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good start. What is after that?
turns.zh: 开头不错。之后呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The bird said, 'I am not for your meal.'
turns.zh: 鸟说：‘我才不是你的午餐。’

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, a bird that talks. That is a laugh.
turns.zh: 哦，一只会说话的鸟。真好笑。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the cat was surprised and went off.
turns.zh: 嗯，猫吓了一跳，就跑掉了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A short story with a smile. Well done.
turns.zh: 一个让人会心一笑的小故事，写得不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you, Miss. I will put it down clean now.
turns.zh: 谢谢老师。我现在把它清楚地写下来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do that. Then hand it in before the bell.
turns.zh: 好，然后在下课前交上来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Miss, I have a question about the last one.
turns.zh: 老师，最后一题我有问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, what is troubling you?
turns.zh: 说吧，哪里不明白？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The words say 'make a new story'. But how long?
turns.zh: 题目说‘编一个新故事’，但要多长呢？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three or four lines is enough. Keep it simple.
turns.zh: 三四行就够了，简单写就行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Ah, I see. So a short one like the cat story.
turns.zh: 哦，明白了。那就写个像猫故事那样短的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will make one about a dog and a ball.
turns.zh: 好，我写一个关于狗和球的故事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A good start. What will the dog do with the ball?
turns.zh: 开头不错。狗会拿球做什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The dog sees the ball in the garden. He runs and gets it.
turns.zh: 狗在花园里看到球，跑过去叼起来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then what? Does he give it back?
turns.zh: 然后呢？他会把球还回去吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, he takes it to his bed and plays with it there.
turns.zh: 不，他把球叼回窝里，在那儿玩。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That story is simple. Put it down now.
turns.zh: 那故事很简单。现在写下来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have done it. Here is my paper.
turns.zh: 我写好了，给您。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me see... Good. The words are clear and the story is short.
turns.zh: 我看看……不错，字迹清楚，故事也简短。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you, Miss. I was not clear about the last question.
turns.zh: 谢谢老师，我刚才对最后一题不太清楚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was a good question. Now put your things away.
turns.zh: 问得好，现在把东西收起来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Miss, I still have a question about the last part.
turns.zh: 老师，我最后一题还有点问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Which part? The one about the dog?
turns.zh: 哪部分？关于狗的那题吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. The paper says 'put what the dog does after that'.
turns.zh: 对，要求写‘狗之后做什么’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. You made a good start.
turns.zh: 没错，你开头写得挺好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But I am not certain if I need to put in more words.
turns.zh: 但我不确定要不要多写几句。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A short story is good. Three or four lines will do.
turns.zh: 短故事就行，三四行就够了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So I can say 'He goes to sleep after the play'?
turns.zh: 那我可以写‘玩完后他就去睡觉’？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That works well. Keep it simple and clear.
turns.zh: 可以，简单清楚就好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put that down now. Thank you, Miss.
turns.zh: 我现在就记下来，谢谢老师。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Take your time. No need to go quick.
turns.zh: 好，慢慢来，不用着急。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have it now. 'He goes to sleep after the play.'
turns.zh: 我写好了，‘玩完后他就去睡觉’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Very good. You see? Not so hard.
turns.zh: 很好，你看，没那么难吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I was troubled for no reason.
turns.zh: 嗯，我白担心了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is normal. New words take time.
turns.zh: 正常，新词总要花时间消化。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: May I say my story out loud?
turns.zh: 我能大声说出我的故事吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us have it.
turns.zh: 好，说来听听。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: 'The dog runs and plays. He goes to sleep after the play.'
turns.zh: ‘小狗跑啊玩啊，玩完后他就去睡觉。’

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Clear and true. Well done.
turns.zh: 清楚又真实，写得不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do the other words now?
turns.zh: 我现在写其他词吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. You have ten more minutes. Go on.
turns.zh: 好，还有十分钟，继续吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do the word 'jump'.
turns.zh: 我来写‘跳’这个词。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Make a short story with it.
turns.zh: 好，用它编个小故事。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cat jumps on the wall. Then it jumps down.
turns.zh: 猫跳上墙，又跳下来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do the one after this.
turns.zh: 做这个之后的一个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about 'run'? I have a story.
turns.zh: 那‘跑’呢？我有个故事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me get that.
turns.zh: 说来听听。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The boy runs to the door. He is late.
turns.zh: 男孩跑到门口，他迟到了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Now do 'sleep'.
turns.zh: 好。现在写‘睡觉’。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The baby sleeps in the bed. It is soft.
turns.zh: 宝宝睡在床上，床很软。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Very good. You are quick today.
turns.zh: 非常好，你今天反应很快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am not clear on the last one.
turns.zh: 最后一题我没搞明白。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Which bit is not clear?
turns.zh: 哪部分不清楚？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do I make a story from what comes after 'put down'?
turns.zh: '写'后面的词。是要我编个故事吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, a short story with the new words.
turns.zh: 对，用新词写个小故事。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, I see. So I put them all in one story?
turns.zh: 哦，懂了。所以我把它们都放进一个故事里？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the idea. Keep it short.
turns.zh: 就是这个意思。写短点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will have a go now.
turns.zh: 好，我现在试试。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. No need to go quick.
turns.zh: 慢慢来，不用着急。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have it. 'The cat sleeps on the soft bed.'
turns.zh: 我写好了：‘猫在软床上睡觉。’

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. That works well.
turns.zh: 不错，这样写可以。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about the word after that? 'Warm'?
turns.zh: 那再下一个词呢？‘温暖’？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Put 'warm' in a line too.
turns.zh: 对，也用‘温暖’造个句。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put 'The sun is warm today.'
turns.zh: 我写‘今天太阳很温暖。’

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Simple and clear. Good work.
turns.zh: 简单明了。写得不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now I need to put all words in one story.
turns.zh: 现在我得把所有词放进一个故事里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the last step. You can do it.
turns.zh: 这是最后一步。你能做到的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have a go. 'The warm sun and the soft bed...'
turns.zh: 我试试：‘温暖的阳光和软软的床……’

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good start. Keep going.
turns.zh: 开头不错，继续写。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I do not see how to end it.
turns.zh: 我不知道怎么结尾。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What do you do after you get up?
turns.zh: 起床后你做什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I get up and go to school.
turns.zh: 我起床去上学。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There you go. Put that in.
turns.zh: 这不就对了，写进去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. 'I get up and go to school.' That is the end.
turns.zh: 好的，‘我起床去上学。’这就是结尾。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The bell is about to go. Time to go back.
turns.zh: 快打铃了，该回去了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put my paper in my bag. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 我把卷子收进书包。谢谢您帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 不客气。下午愉快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. I will leave.
turns.zh: 您也是。我先走了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See you tomorrow. And do your best on that last question.
turns.zh: 明天见。最后那道题好好做。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. I get it now. Thanks again.
turns.zh: 我会的。现在懂了。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Off you go. Do not be late for the one after this.
turns.zh: 好。快走吧。后面的别迟到。

storyBlurb: 甲没听懂作业要求，放学前鼓起勇气举手提问。乙耐心解答，甲终于安心收拾书包回家。
storyScript:
【开场·到校上课】周四上午第二节课的铃声响起，甲抱着课本匆匆走进教室。阳光斜斜地照在讲台上，乙老师已经站在黑板前，微笑着等待同学们坐定。甲找到自己的座位，翻开笔记本，笔尖轻轻抵着纸面，准备开始今天的课程。

【进行·听讲练习】乙老师转身在黑板上写下几个新词，粉笔划过黑板发出清脆的声响。她一边讲解词义，一边举例造句。甲认真听着，手指随着老师的节奏在笔记本上移动，记下每一个要点。随后，乙发下一张练习纸，让同学们试着用新词完成句子。教室里安静下来，只有笔尖摩擦纸张的沙沙声。甲盯着题目，前几题还算顺利，可最后一题的说明让他皱起了眉头——他不太明白到底要写什么。他反复读了几遍要求，还是觉得模糊。

【进行·提问回答】时间一分一秒过去，眼看就要下课了。甲犹豫着，手指在练习纸边缘来回摩挲。终于，他深吸一口气，举起了手。乙老师看见，点头示意他发言。甲站起来，指着练习纸上的说明，小声说出自己的困惑。乙老师走近，俯身看了看题目，然后微笑着用更简单的例子重新解释了一遍。甲听着，眼睛渐渐亮起来，连连点头。他坐下后，迅速在纸上写下了答案，心里踏实了许多。

【收束·放学回家】下课铃响了，乙老师宣布放学。甲收拾好书包，把练习纸小心地夹进课本里。他走到门口时，回头看了一眼黑板上的新词，嘴角微微上扬。阳光依然明亮，他快步走出教室，心里想着回家后要把今天的作业认真完成。
